title: Corrigendum related to Companies (Audit and Auditors) Second Amendment Rules, 2018
description: Corrigendum related to Companies (Audit and Auditors) Second Amendment Rules, 2018
text: [TO BE PUBLISHED IN THE GAZETTE OF INDIA, EXTRAORDINARY, PART I I , SECTION 3, SUB-SECTION (i)] GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS New Delhi, I ?May, 2018 CORRIGENDUM G.S.R (E).~ In the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Corporate Affairs number G.S.R. 432(E), dated the 7th May, 2018, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part I I , Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 7th May, 2018, at page 2, in line 7, for "Amendment" read "Second Amendment".
